styles.minimal_light: Light, minimalist, lots of whitespace. Apple, Linear, Vercel feel.
styles.dark_tech: Dark / near-black background, premium tech feel. SaaS infrastructure pages.
styles.illustration: Heavy illustration or 3D-rendered character / object. Loom, Notion hero cards.
styles.dashboard_mockup: Card built around a UI screenshot or data visualisation.
styles.split: Two-column split — text one side, visual other side.
styles.colorful_playful: Bright accent colours, playful typography, illustrative mascots.
styles.editorial_text: Oversized typography is the entire visual. Pull-quote / magazine feel.
styles.collage: Multiple smaller elements arranged in a collage / scrapbook layout.
